name: 身份反差開場
description: 女主在公司被上司羞辱為廢物，隨即男主以霸總姿態出現逼上司下跪道歉。觀眾在極短時間內經歷從「壓抑」到「爽快」的情緒跳轉，瞬間建立男主的強大人設和對男女主互動的期待。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: Every proposal you design is trash / Two choices / Either kneel down and apologize to her / or leave a finger as compensation / Five / Four / Grandma I was wrong / I'll kowtow to you

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: I didn't die from the fall. / You Heavenly Emperor! / How dare you kick me down from the mortal realm! / Don't you know I'm afraid of heights?
